## ⚠️ Before you paste any XML

**Do not paste mapper XML from a proprietary codebase.** Write a minimal
synthetic reproduction instead: keep the structure (tags, nesting,
placeholders) and invent all identifiers/tables/columns. See CONTRIBUTING.

<!-- smallest synthetic XML that reproduces the problem -->
